name: Torsha Goswami
title: Environmental Scientist & Watershed Ecologist
affiliation: PhD Student · Biology, Kansas State University
tagline: Studying how water shapes landscapes and how landscapes shape water.
summary: PhD researcher at the intersection of eco-hydrology, watershed modeling, and environmental change. Work spans SWAT-based watershed modeling (OK.HAWQS), GIS, woody encroachment and streamflow in grassland ecosystems, BMP evaluation, and translating science into watershed plans for stakeholders and policy.
certifications: Hargis Leadership Institute, Oklahoma State University
Scholarship of Teaching and Learning Workshop Certificate
Executive Presence on Video Conference Calls
